codeReview.summary: Commit f55b0a3d1ea49e15404a5b9874e8222bb6c52f94 stays scoped to the four expected catalog test files and only swaps each class's shared PASSWORD constant to the inert placeholder `changeme`. In all four files, the same PASSWORD constant is still passed to `ensureUser(...)` during seeding and used again in the `/api/v1/auth/login` payload helper, so the seeded login flows remain aligned and the reviewed diff does not touch production code, API contracts, or catalog behavior.

summary: Pass. The reviewed follow-up is limited to the four specified test fixtures, preserves seeded-login alignment by keeping seeding and login on the same PASSWORD constant, and introduces no blocking or non-blocking issues.
